A

AbstractArrayWriter - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs
Positional state for forward-only array writers.
AbstractNativeArray<W extends AbstractArrayWriter> - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs
The base of all native arrays: one aligned allocation, cached base address, and lifecycle.
AbstractNativeCollection<A extends AbstractNativeArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter> - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs
The base of all native collections: allocator, backing array, size, and lifecycle.
AbstractNativeList<A extends AbstractNativeArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter> - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs
The contiguous-storage engine behind lists, stacks, and heaps.
AbstractNativeMap<T extends PStruct> - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs
The struct-entry hash engine behind the maps: open addressing over a keyed layout with a reserved zero-key slot.
AbstractNativeRing<A extends AbstractNativeArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter> - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs
The ring engine behind queues, deques, and buffers: wraparound head and tail over one array.
AbstractPrimitiveArray<W extends AbstractArrayWriter> - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs
A native array of fixed-width elements with checked and unchecked access.
AbstractPrimitiveDeque<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter> - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs
The marker base for primitive deques.
AbstractPrimitiveFixedQueue<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter> - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs
The marker base for primitive fixed queues.
AbstractPrimitiveHeap<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter> - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs
The marker base for primitive heaps.
AbstractPrimitiveList<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter> - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs
The marker base for primitive lists.
AbstractPrimitiveQueue<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter> - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs
The marker base for primitive queues.
AbstractPrimitiveRingBuffer<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter> - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs
The marker base for primitive ring buffers.
AbstractPrimitiveStack<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter> - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs
The marker base for primitive stacks.

P

PBitSet - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.impl.sets
A growable native bitset over 64-bit words; reads past the end are false.
PBitSet() - Constructor for class com.tonic.jaloc.impl.sets.PBitSet
Creates an empty bitset on the system allocator.
PBitSet(long) - Constructor for class com.tonic.jaloc.impl.sets.PBitSet
Creates a bitset presized for nbits on the system allocator.
PBitSet(NativeAllocator, long) - Constructor for class com.tonic.jaloc.impl.sets.PBitSet
Creates a bitset presized for nbits on the given allocator.
PBoolArray - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.impl.arrays
A fixed-length native bool array, bit-packed eight per byte.
PBoolArray(long) - Constructor for class com.tonic.jaloc.impl.arrays.PBoolArray
Allocates length elements on the system allocator, zeroed.
PBoolArray(NativeAllocator, long) - Constructor for class com.tonic.jaloc.impl.arrays.PBoolArray
Allocates length elements on the given allocator, zeroed.
PBoolArray2D - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.impl.array2ds
A fixed-shape 2D bool array over a single bit-packed native allocation, addressed row-major.
PBoolArray2D(long, long) - Constructor for class com.tonic.jaloc.impl.array2ds.PBoolArray2D
Allocates a rows x columns grid on the system allocator, all bits cleared.
PBoolArray2D(NativeAllocator, long, long) - Constructor for class com.tonic.jaloc.impl.array2ds.PBoolArray2D
Allocates a rows x columns grid on the given allocator, all bits cleared.
PBoolDeque - Class in com.tonic.jaloc.impl.dequeues
A growable native bool deque over a bit-packed ring.
PBoolDeque() - Constructor for class com.tonic.jaloc.impl.dequeues.PBoolDeque
Creates an empty deque with zero capacity on the system allocator.
PBoolDeque(long) - Constructor for class com.tonic.jaloc.impl.dequeues.PBoolDeque
Creates an empty deque with the given starting capacity on the system allocator.
PBoolDeque(NativeAllocator, long) - Constructor for class com.tonic.jaloc.impl.dequeues.PBoolDeque
Creates an empty deque with the given starting capacity on the given allocator.

PBoolFixedQueue(NativeAllocator, long) - Constructor for class com.tonic.jaloc.impl.fixedqueues.PBoolFixedQueue
Allocates a queue of the given capacity on the given allocator.
